name: Nectarine-Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, toss the cubed cooked chicken with 1/4 cup of dry white wine. Cover and refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
2. Stir together 1/4 cup of mayonnaise and sour cream. Mix this dressing into the marinated chicken until well combined. Season with salt to taste.
3. Coarsely chop half of the nectarines and slice the remaining half for garnish.
4. Add the chopped nectarines and slivered almonds to the chicken mixture.
5. Chill the salad in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
6. Serve on a platter or plates lined with greens, garnished with sliced nectarines.
